hero_subtitle: Redesigning hybrid collaboration through Extended Reality (XR) technologies
cta_sub: Help us shape the future of hybrid collaboration – get in touch
about_p1: The validation project HoloSpaceXR aims to fundamentally redesign hybrid meetings through the consistent use of Extended Reality (XR) technologies. The project plans to develop and validate an immersive and equal meeting experience regardless of participants' physical location. In the future, remote participants will be projected into the physical room as interactive avatars using virtual and augmented reality, for example as holograms with realistic spatial sound positioning ("spatial audio").
about_fig1: POV of a remote participant perceiving the physical space as a digital copy and seeing users in the room as avatars.
about_p2: Against the backdrop that hybrid meetings are becoming the standard in the modern workplace—and that remote participants are often disadvantaged (e.g., due to limited inclusion, reduced interaction, and more difficult non-verbal communication)—the project intends to address these disadvantages through innovative XR solutions. By combining immersive XR elements, realistic spatial representation, and novel interaction design, HoloSpaceXR aims to lay the foundation for "meetings at eye level", enabling a form of digital spatial presence.
tech_p1: The NewWorkDesignLab previously demonstrated in the preliminary project "VR-Minilab" how real spaces and virtual avatars can be synchronized and displayed together. Building on these findings, the HoloSpaceXR project plans to further develop proprietary applications for VR headsets and multi-user solutions, ultimately creating a validated prototype.
tech_fig1: Preliminary project "VR-Minilab": a physical room (left) overlaid with a geometrically identical virtual representation (view through VR headset).
objective_1: Market validation through corporate studies (target NPS score: 7–10)
objective_2: Technical validation of the HoloSpaceXR prototypes
objective_3: Development and evaluation of a business model, including financial planning
objective_4: Assessment of the technological maturity level
innovation_p1: In contrast to existing XR or videoconferencing solutions, HoloSpaceXR aims to connect physical and virtual realities in real time, including real spatial mapping, position-accurate avatars, and immersive sound environments. This advancement creates innovation potential that goes beyond traditional videoconferencing—both technologically and socially.
innovation_fig1: The integration of digital content into the physical space between participants.
innovation_p2: Within the project, there is also a clear objective to reduce business travel, thereby contributing to CO₂ reduction and climate protection. The global growth potential of XR technology, virtual meetings, and e-learning further underscores the relevance of the project.
innovation_p3: HoloSpaceXR plans to focus on the areas of corporate collaboration, education, training, and event communication, opening up new markets. Its innovative function as a bridge between real space and virtual presence is intended to provide companies with a clear competitive advantage in an increasingly hybrid working world.
details_funding_value: European Regional Development Fund (ERDF) Validation Funding Programme 2021–2027
details_team_value: Marius Brade, Natalie Lehnart, Nicos Lentzsch, Cora Marie Lenz, Otto Maurer

privacy_s2_title: 2. Collection and Storage of Personal Data
privacy_s2_intro: When you visit our website, certain information is automatically collected by the hosting provider (server log files). This includes:
privacy_s2_list:
• IP address of the requesting device
  • Date and time of access
  • Name and URL of the requested file
  • Browser and operating system used
privacy_s2_outro: This data is used solely to ensure reliable operation of the website and is deleted after no more than 14 days.
privacy_s3_intro: When you use our contact form, we collect the following data:
privacy_s3_purpose: Purpose: To process your inquiry and communicate with you during our testing phase.
privacy_s3_legal: Legal basis: Your consent pursuant to Art. 6(1)(a) DSGVO (checkbox in the form).
privacy_s3_retention: Retention period: Your data is stored until the purpose of the inquiry is fulfilled or you request deletion.
privacy_s3_confirm: After submitting the form, you will receive a confirmation email at the provided address.
privacy_s4_text: When registering an account, we store your email address and your chosen display name. Authentication is handled via Supabase (see section on data processors).
privacy_s4_legal: Legal basis: Performance of a contract pursuant to Art. 6(1)(b) DSGVO.
privacy_s5_intro: We use the following third-party services for data processing:
privacy_s5_list:
• Supabase Inc. – Database and authentication (server location: EU)
  • NWDL Mail Server (server.nwdl.org) – Sending confirmation and notification emails
privacy_s5_outro: Data processing agreements pursuant to Art. 28 DSGVO are in place with all processors.
privacy_s6_intro: You have the right at any time to:
privacy_s6_list:
• Access your stored data (Art. 15 DSGVO)
  • Rectification of inaccurate data (Art. 16 DSGVO)
  • Erasure of your data (Art. 17 DSGVO)
  • Restriction of processing (Art. 18 DSGVO)
  • Data portability (Art. 20 DSGVO)
  • Withdraw your consent (Art. 7(3) DSGVO)
privacy_s6_contact: To exercise your rights, please contact:
privacy_s6_complaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.
privacy_s7_intro: You may request the complete deletion of your personal data stored by us at any time. To do so, send an email to:
privacy_s7_outro: We will comply with your deletion request without undue delay and no later than 30 days, and will inform you once the deletion is complete.
privacy_s8_text: Our website uses only technically necessary cookies (e.g. session cookies for authentication). No tracking or marketing cookies are used.
privacy_s9_text: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy to reflect changes in the law or our services. The current version is always available on this page.
